items.situation: two students debating whether to keep their early-morning gym routine

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Are you still hitting the gym at six-thirty every morning this term?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, I'm tempted to switch to evenings. The weight room is packed by six forty-five.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? It used to be pretty empty that early last semester.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, but the new fitness app dropped a six AM strength class, and everyone wants in.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I bet the seven PM slot is quieter then. I might join you.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good plan. Just be ready for the cardio machines after dinner.

questions.stem: According to the conversation, what has recently changed at the morning gym?

options.A: It now hosts a popular early strength class
options.B: It has started charging a new entry fee
options.C: It has reduced its weekday operating hours
options.D: It moved its weight machines to another floor

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：男生提到新的健身app开了一个早上六点的力量训练课，导致器械区六点四十五就被挤满。B错误：对话中从未提到收费变化。C错误：对话讨论的是人多而非营业时间缩短。D错误：器械只是被人占满，并没有提到搬到别处。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?

options.A: Cancel his gym membership for the rest of the term
options.B: Wake up even earlier to beat the morning crowd
options.C: Move his workout to the seven PM evening slot
options.D: Sign up for the popular early strength class

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：男生明确说想改到晚上锻炼，女生提出晚上七点的时段更安静，男生表示同意。A错误：男生只是换时间，并没说退掉会员。B错误：早起会更挤，他正是要避开这种情况，是被否决的选项。D错误：那个抢手的强训课正是让他想躲开的原因。

items.situation: a student picking up a held package from the campus mailroom

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hi, I got a slip saying my package is being held. Can you check on it?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sure, do you have your student ID? I'll need that to release it.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, here it is. The slip says the box arrived three days ago.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, the holding rule kicked in. Anything over forty-eight hours gets a one-dollar daily fee.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, really? I didn't see that on the notice.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: It's posted by the door now. You owe two dollars today. Cash or card?

questions.stem: Why does the man come to the mailroom?

options.A: To send an outgoing package by overnight mail
options.B: To pick up a package that is being held
options.C: To complain about a missing delivery slip
options.D: To update the address on his student account

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：对话开头男生明确说他拿了取件单，想取被代收的包裹。A错误：他来取件，不是寄件。C错误：他有取件单，没投诉单据丢失。D错误：对话只用了学生证核验身份，从未谈到改地址。

questions.stem: What does the woman say about the package-holding rule?

options.A: Packages incur a daily fee after forty-eight hours
options.B: Packages are returned to the sender after seven days
options.C: Packages must be retrieved during morning hours only
options.D: Packages require a signed approval from a roommate

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：女生说超过48小时之后，每天加收一美元保管费。B错误：对话没提到包裹会被退回。C错误：对话没说只能上午取。D错误：对话只要求学生证，没要求室友签字。

items.situation: two students figuring out how to attend a guest lecture and a club meeting on the same evening

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I can't decide — the linguistics talk or the debate club meeting tonight?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Why not both? The talk starts at six and only runs an hour. You'd make the meeting by seven-fifteen.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, but the speaker takes questions afterward. I might miss that part.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Skip the Q-and-A. The slides usually go up online by morning anyway.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Right, that's true. And debate practice runs late, so I shouldn't miss the start.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Exactly. Hit the talk first, then sprint over to Brennan Hall.

questions.stem: What is the conversation mainly about?

options.A: Choosing a topic for an upcoming debate competition
options.B: Finding a quiet study space for a linguistics class
options.C: Fitting two campus events into the same evening
options.D: Comparing two newly renovated halls on campus

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：整段对话的核心是女生想同时去语言学讲座和辩论俱乐部，男生帮她设计如何兼顾两个活动。A错误：他们在讨论日程，并非辩题。B错误：对话没提找安静的学习空间。D错误：Brennan Hall只是个聚会地点，没有对比新楼。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the linguistics talk?

options.A: Its main speaker also leads the debate club
options.B: Its question-and-answer session is optional to attend
options.C: Its slides will be shown again at the debate meeting
options.D: Its location has been moved to a different hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：男生说幻灯片会上传到网上，可以跳过Q&A，暗示问答环节并非必须。A错误：对话从未把讲座主讲人和辩论俱乐部联系起来。C错误：幻灯片只是会上传网络，不是在辩论会议上重新展示。D错误：对话没提到讲座更换地点。
